---
title: "Kei Ikegami"
---

![](/images/profile.jpg){.profile-image}


Lecturer, Yokohama City University 

Email: ikegami.kei0120 [at] gmail.com

I am an economist working on industrial organization, econometrics, and market design.

My research interests include:

- auctions
- matching and market design
- empirical industrial organization
- econometric methods

## Upcoming Presentations

- **IIOC 2026**, Boston, April 9–12, 2026
- **SSCW 2026**, Tokyo, June 13–16, 2026
